titleStmt.title: SII 9.251: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 251. (A.R. No. 210 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PAMPAPATISVAMI TEMPLE AT BENNEHALLI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 11th year of the reign of Pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalla dēva (II) Śukla, Charitra, śu. (?) amāvāse, Sōmavāra, Vyatīpāta, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Sūrya-grahaṇa. The date is irregular. Chaitra-Amāvāse in Śukla corresponded to A.D. 1149 April 9 Saturday, but there was no solar eclipse on that day nor was it a day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. There was however a solar eclipse on Chaitra-Amāvāsyā of Vibhava = A.D. 1148 April 20 Tuesday, but even that was not a day of Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. It states that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jagadēkamalla-Vīrapāṇḍyadēva, who was ruling over Noṇambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand from the capital Uchchaṅgi, granted the village Beṇṇeganūru, situated in Muttage thirty, a sub-division of Kōgaḷi, five-hundred, to the Mahāpradhāna Vatsarāja to be given to the temple of the god Svayambhudēva of the village. Vatsarasa, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nāchidēva, Allamarasa, Kaliṅgarasa and the Ūroḍeya Mallarasa granted a vṛitti to the āchārya Chandraraśi-Paṇḍita and 12 Brāhmans of the brahmapurī of the temple. At this time Nāchidēvarasa of the Kadamba family is stated to have been ruling over Koṭṭūru twelve and Kōgaḷi five-hundred from the capital Koṭṭūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayaścābhyudayaśca namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trelōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbāya śaṁbhavē . rakṣisuge virūpākṣanapēkṣeyanosedittu dharmmamaṁ śāsanadiṁ rakṣiparaṁ be
ṇneganūrakṣayanamaḷaṁ svayaṁbhuvācaṁdrārkkaṁ . śrīsvayaṁbhuvirūpākṣadēvāyanamaḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭāra
kaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvavi
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇapurada nele
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire © tatpādapadmōjīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdaṁ śrīma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yadvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷa
paricchēdigaṇḍa rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ śrīmanmahāma
śrījagadēkamallavīrapāṇḍyadēvaru noṇaṁbavāḍi muvatticchāsiramumaṁ Uccaṁgiya taḷavīḍino
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . malemalevaṁtuṭaṁ maṟedu bēḷidudaṁ sale tettu bāḷdo
me lābhamenutta cimmidarbbalayutarappa manneyarē ninnaya tottideyeṁdu jīvisutala
migaccariyādudu vīrapāṇḍyana . dharegeseve pāṇḍyalakṣmīdharanāḷva noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsirada śira
paṁcasatakanāmāṁkitadiṁ © janavinūtanenipa pāṇḍyāvanipāḷana siriya
nidhānaṁ śrīvaiṣṇavajananayanōtpaḷasudhāṁśu vatsacamūpaṁ . Ā mahānubhāvanavvaya
Anupamamappa kammekulameṁba sarōruhaśaṇḍadoḷkanatkanakasarōjavuḷḷalarddu raṁjisuvaṁ
nene meṟeyuttamippubhayapakṣaviśuddhatevetta rājahaṁsana teṟanentuṭante janasaṁ stutigī
. maleyaṁ kīḷmale māḍi sāṁtaḷigeyaṁ niściṁtadiṁdāḷvanā malepaṁmanneyarādiyādakhiḷa
dōrbbalamaṁ tōṟidaninnarārenisidaṁ sarbbajñadaṇḍādhipaṁ nelanura nēseṟumuḷḷinaṁ nilisidaṁ lōkaikamu
Ā vibhuvina kānte jagatpāvane sucaritre lalitagātre lasadbhūdēvakuḷalakṣmi nāgaladēvi pati
vadenesedaḷu . Avarirbbargaṁ puṭṭidanavanīsaṁstutya nityabhāgyōdayanarnnavagaṁbhīraṁ lakṣmīdharanaṁ śrīvatsāṁ
ka catura trimaṁtrapratibhakhaṇḍanasamagraśaktitrayasanumaṁtracāṇikya śrīmā
gōtrapāṇḍyanripana vatsacamūpaṁ . daḷitasarōjavirdda koḷaniṁdrakujaṁ nelasirdda nandanaṁ kuḷivasu
gaganasthaḷimāṇikavirdda lōhaṇācaḷavenisirdda pūrvvagiri vatsacamūpatiyirdda
tōditaṁ śubhadavunna tavūrjitavuttarōttaraṁ . varaguṇi vatsaṇadaṇḍēśvarana manō
tānvite bhāsvaddharaṇīsute yeṁdoḍārddore veṇnaladēvigakhiḷabhuvanāntaradoḷu .
narapāḷasabhāsadanekke ratnadīpada teṟadaṁte lōhitakuḷābjavanakkinarōciyaṁte ni dade
mirppudidu bēṟe vicāripoḍoṁdu puṇyapuṁjada teṟadiṁ cirāyuvaḍedippudu muddana gāḍi
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ kādaṁbakuḷa
kamaḷamārttaṁḍa nuḍidantegaṁḍaṁ ripumaṇḍaḷikabēṁṭekāṟaṁ ghaṭṭidēvanaṁkakāṟaṁ śrī hāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ nācidēvarasaru . Ādirājacaritraṁ saṁgrāmabhīmanabhinavakāmaṁ kṛtalalāma tta
manabhinavamēru nācinripāḷa . baḷavadvidviṣṭamattadvipavidaḷitakaṁṭhīravaṁ vīravairikuḷabhūbhritcaṇḍavajraṁ
maṇibrātavirdda rkyaṁ viḷāsacaritraratnākaranabhavapadāṁbhōjabhṛṁga mahīmaṇḍaḷadoḷugra ṟi
namaḷaguṇāḷaṁkrita nācidēva . Arisamitikōṭiyaṁ saṁgaradoḷu geluttirppa sauryyamartthibrajamaṁ karadīva cā
gameṁdu dharegesedudu nācidēvabhūpāḷakana . Intu negarttegaṁ pogarttegaṁ tāne janmabhūmiyeṁbī koṭṭūrppanneraḍumaṁ kō
gaḷi Ainūṟumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḻdu maṁḍaḷikajagadaḷaṁ toṁḍamaṁḍaḷikagaṁḍabhīruṁḍa biru
damaṁḍaḷikagarvvasarvvasvasūṟekāṟa ghaṭidēvanaṁkakāṟaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ nācidēvarasaru koṭṭūralu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīrapāṇḍya
dēvaru mahāpradhānaṁ hiriyadaṁḍanāyakaṁ vatsarasargge kōgaḷiyainūṟara kaṁpaṇa muttage mūvattaṟoḷagaṇa
beṇneganūraṁ śrīsvayaṁbhudēvarige dhārāpūrvvakaṁmāḍi koṭṭaru . svasti śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ hiriyadaṁḍanāyakaṁ vatsarasa
ruṁ manneyanācidēvanuṁ Allamarasanuṁ piradūra kaliṁgarasanuṁ samastamanneyaruṁ Ūroḍeya mallarasapramukhaṁ sarbbanama
śyavāgi biṭṭu śrīmajjagadēkamallavarṣada 11 neya śuklasaṁvatsarada caitra suddha (?) Amavāse sōmavāra byatīpāta Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrā
ntiyalu beṇneganūra śrīsvayaṁbhudēvarācāryye caṁdrarāsipaṇḍitadēvarggaṁ dēvara brahmapuriya hannirbbarggaṁ
sūryyagrahaṇadalu dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru Ī vritti dēvara tapōdhanargge bhāga bāhmaṇargge bhāga tējassāmya dēvarige
pannagarājabhūṣaṇapadābjamaṁ śaraṇendu bhaktisaṁpannateyiṁde kaimugiUdallade manne gā ṇikesēsetappanneyavāyadāyamivu
sallavu sarbbanamaśyamendu biṭṭaṁ neṟe nācidēvanakhiḷōrbbaresūryyaśaśāṁkaruḷḷinaṁ . svasti saṁsārasārapārāvāramadajaḷamaha
sōttuṁgataraṁgabhagnamagnānēkaprāṇijātikarimakaratimitimiṁggiḷaprakritiprakṣubhitavarttagarttāntaśivānu gṛhītaviśiṣṭajanōttaraṇa catura
gamakavādivādaniyamōpanyāsacaturvēdavēdāntasiddhāntaśravaṇavēditaru śrīmallakuḷīśvaradēvamukhakamaḷavinirggata
caraṇāravrindapurandabalindamāravindanandananēsaundararumappa śrīmanmahāgrahāra hūliya śrī paṁcaliṁgadēvapādābjabhriṁgaruṁ śrī
siṁhaparṣe Abhinavapāśupatamaṭha śrīvidyārāśipaṁḍitadēvaru . Avara śiśyaru . śrutadoḷu śīladoḷāgamōktaśāstradoḷu tapōnu
ṣṭhānadoḷu parahitabyāpāradoḷu gauravākritiyoḷu mandaradhairyyadoḷu pōlvarene baṇnise dharmmarāśimunipaṁ dhanyaṁ pe
ṟarddhanyarē . Avara śiśyaru . sukanōrbbaṁ skaṁdanōrbbaṁ pavanetaneyanōrbbannadījātanōrbba(ṁ)nneṁbīnālvaroḷā sukananna
nnapavanataneyananna nadījātanannanene jagaṁ baṇnise caṁdrarāśimunīśa . Intī Abhinavapāśu patasantānada dēvareni
suvudu . nadītīrada śrīsvayaṁbhūdēvara dibyatīrtthada hannirbbaru brāhmaṇara māhātmeyeṁteṁdeḍe . svasti yamaniya
masvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānejapasamādhiśīlādyanēkaguṇasaṁpannaruṁ Avupāsanāgnihōtradvijaguru
pūjātatpararuṁ mārttaṇḍōjjvaḷakīrttiśāstraviśāradarumappa kāśyapagōtrada śivadēvaruṁ bhāradvājagōtrada gōvindabhaṭṭaru śrīvatsa
gōtrada basavaṇabhaṭṭaruṁ . bhāradvājagōtrada dēvaṇabhaṭṭaruṁ . bhāradvājagōtra nācyaṇabhaṭṭaruṁ kāśyapagōtrada pa
ṭṭavarddhana kēśavaghaissaruṁ . viśvāmitragōtrada śrīdharabhaṭṭaruṁ mōnabhārggavagōtrada Īśvaraghaissaruṁ . bhāradvājagō
trada padmaṇaghaissaruṁ . kāśyapagōtrada Adityabhaṭṭaruṁ . daṇnāyakaraḷiya dāśyaṇabhaṭṭaruṁ śiva
ra putra lakṣmīdharebhaṭṭaruṁ Intī śivapurada sīmāsemmaṁdhaventeṁdeḍe Īśānyadalu hakkigana huṇise mūḍaṇa bhāgadalu
ddeṟe Āgnēyada bhāgadalu mugguḍḍe naṭṭakallu nēṟilakeṟeya nillajjigeya mugguḍḍe naṭṭa kallu nairittyadalu haḍuvaṇa bhāgadalu
lijīyara koḷa nadige teṁkaṇa maṇna Alliṁ haḍuva basadiya Āneyakallu vāyābyadalu Ūraḍeyara mā
baḍagaṇa bhāgada hāsaṟenīrvvari dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa Ūraḍeya mallarasaṁ bāguḍiya cennakēśava
vara sa�vopadoḷu dettida suṁka dēvargge . Īdaṁ pratipāḷise śivalōkaThe continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 9.251 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
